title: Promethean Season 2
description: This is the modpack for the second season of the Promethean SMP
body:
Season 2 of the Promethean SMP Pack!
Join Here!
[https://discord.gg/3yCv7BwESU](https://discord.gg/3yCv7BwESU)

This is a modpack designed to be somewhat challenging, with a heavy emphasis on innovative machines and beautiful biomes. Featuring Create, Applied Energistics, Hephaestus, and more!
